zh.St. Albans, Hertfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯
zh.lifeSummary: Mary FitzHugh於1471年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾。她於1494年與Thomas Lowe I在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1512年在她的家鄉享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Mary FitzHugh was born in 1471, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Thomas Lowe I in 1494, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1512, in her hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary FitzHugh est née en 1471, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Thomas Lowe I en 1494, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1512, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary FitzHughは1471年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。1494年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスでThomas Lowe Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1512年に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary FitzHugh(은)는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 Thomas Lowe I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.
